decisions.decision: v1.0.0 ship gated on Plan 06-01 (Situation Room spec-complete), NOT shipped from rc.8
decisions.rationale: Live Playwright drill discovered Situation Room renders 'no owner assigned' Critical Path rows with no action affordances + Create-Task dialog unstyled (CSS scope mismatch). Operator chose Option 3 - pause, plan properly, then ship.

decisions.decision: Authoritative source for 'is this operator-initiated' is chat_messages.sender_kind='user', NOT the host-side authorType
decisions.rationale: Host stamps ALL plugin-worker createComment calls as authorType:'system' regardless of who initiated. Verified across Plan 04.1-11 Task-created marker AND rc.8 Phase B operator chat sends.

decisions.decision: Defense-in-depth filters need a shared source-of-truth predicate
decisions.rationale: Phase B Fix 3 (worker classifier allowlist) was incomplete without Fix 4 (UI mirror allowlist). Both layers needed the same exemption.

decisions.decision: Diagnostics chip removed in rc.8 final (kept type signature for callers)
decisions.rationale: Operator decided the in-UI toggle adds noise without measurable benefit; the includeDiagnostics worker param stays available for future restoration via slash-command/settings/URL param.

decisions.decision: true-task-dialog CSS broadened from [data-clarity-surface=chat] to bare [data-clarity-surface]
decisions.rationale: Dialog primitives need to apply on Situation Room / Reader / Archive surfaces too. Surface-qualified scope was over-narrow.
